panels.title: Model versions in production (scored bars per version)

targets.rawSql: SELECT model_version, count() AS scored, sum(is_anomaly) AS flagged, round(avg(anomaly_score), 4) AS avg_score, min(_ingested_at) AS first_seen, max(_ingested_at) AS last_seen FROM nse.anomalies_ml WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start) GROUP BY model_version ORDER BY last_seen DESC

panels.title: Isolation Forest flag rate
panels.description: Flags / scored bars per 15m — drift indicator (baseline = contamination 1%)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfFifteenMinutes(window_start) AS time, sum(is_anomaly) / count() AS flag_rate FROM nse.anomalies_ml WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Anomaly score distribution over time (p1 / p50 / p99)
panels.description: Downward drift of p50 suggests feature distribution shift → retrain

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfFifteenMinutes(window_start) AS time, quantile(0.01)(anomaly_score) AS p01, quantile(0.5)(anomaly_score) AS p50, quantile(0.99)(anomaly_score) AS p99 FROM nse.anomalies_ml WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Detections per method per hour (ensemble inputs)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfHour(ts) AS time, detection_method, count() AS fired FROM nse.anomalies WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, detection_method ORDER BY time

panels.title: Latest flagged bars (Isolation Forest) with feature vectors

targets.rawSql: SELECT window_start, ticker, model_version, round(anomaly_score, 4) AS score, features FROM nse.anomalies_ml WHERE is_anomaly = 1 AND $__timeFilter(window_start) ORDER BY window_start DESC LIMIT 50
